name: The Ghost
tagline: The one they retreated doesn't feel safe anymore.

mythic_signature.description: Strikes bypass the opponent's top tough and target any face-up-via-retreat tough in their stack. Forces a reveal on the stack path during the attack.
mythic_signature.balance_note: Glass cannon. Strike 9 is brutal. R 5 means The Ghost falls to a single well-equipped attacker. Use to pick off the opponent's retreated tough before they can shift it back up.
